if.if: AND pr.rcvr_user_id = #{userId} AND NVL(pr.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND NVL(pr.archive_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND ps.sndr_user_id = #{userId} AND NVL(ps.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND NVL(ps.archive_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND ( (pr.rcvr_user_id = #{userId} AND pr.archive_yn = 'Y' AND NVL(pr.del_yn, 'N') = 'N') OR (ps.sndr_user_id = #{userId} AND ps.archive_yn = 'Y' AND NVL(ps.del_yn, 'N') = 'N') )
AND ( (pr.rcvr_user_id = #{userId} AND pr.del_yn = 'S') OR (ps.sndr_user_id = #{userId} AND ps.del_yn = 'S') )

mapper.insert: insert into post_master (ntce_sj, ntce_cn, ntce_snd_dt, ntce_type_cd) values (#{ntceSj}, #{ntceCn}, #{ntceSndDt}, #{ntceTypeCd})
insert into post_sender (ntce_sn, sndr_user_id, del_yn, archive_yn) values (#{ntceSn}, #{sndrUserId}, 'N', 'N')
insert into post_receiver (ntce_sn, rcvr_user_id, del_yn, archive_yn) values (#{ntceSn}, #{rcvrUserId}, 'N', 'N')

insert all
into post_receiver (ntce_sn, rcvr_user_id, del_yn, archive_yn) values (#{r.ntceSn}, #{r.rcvrUserId}, 'N', 'N')
select 1 from dual
mapper.select: select pm.ntce_sn, pm.ntce_sj, pm.ntce_cn, pm.ntce_snd_dt, pm.ntce_type_cd, ps.sndr_user_id, sndr_m.user_name as sndr_name, sndr_jg.jbgr_nm as sndr_jbgr_nm, pr.rcvr_user_id, rcvr_m.user_name as rcvr_name, rcvr_jg.jbgr_nm as rcvr_jbgr_nm from post_master pm left join post_receiver pr on pm.ntce_sn = pr.ntce_sn and pr.rcvr_user_id = ( case when exists (select 1 from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn and rcvr_user_id = #{userId}) then #{userId} else (select min(rcvr_user_id) from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn) end ) left join post_sender ps on pm.ntce_sn = ps.ntce_sn left join member sndr_m on ps.sndr_user_id = sndr_m.user_id left join employee_info sndr_ei on ps.sndr_user_id = sndr_ei.user_id left join job_grade sndr_jg on sndr_ei.jbgr_cd = sndr_jg.jbgr_cd left join member rcvr_m on pr.rcvr_user_id = rcvr_m.user_id left join employee_info rcvr_ei on pr.rcvr_user_id = rcvr_ei.user_id left join job_grade rcvr_jg on rcvr_ei.jbgr_cd = rcvr_jg.jbgr_cd where pm.ntce_sn = #{postSn}

select pm.ntce_sn, pm.ntce_sj, pm.ntce_cn, pm.ntce_snd_dt, pm.ntce_type_cd, ps.sndr_user_id, sndr_m.user_name as sndr_name, sndr_jg.jbgr_nm as sndr_jbgr_nm, pr.rcvr_user_id, rcvr_m.user_name as rcvr_name, rcvr_jg.jbgr_nm as rcvr_jbgr_nm from post_master pm left join post_receiver pr on pm.ntce_sn = pr.ntce_sn and pr.rcvr_user_id = ( case when exists (select 1 from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn and rcvr_user_id = #{userId}) then #{userId} else (select min(rcvr_user_id) from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn) end ) left join post_sender ps on pm.ntce_sn = ps.ntce_sn left join member sndr_m on ps.sndr_user_id = sndr_m.user_id left join employee_info sndr_ei on ps.sndr_user_id = sndr_ei.user_id left join job_grade sndr_jg on sndr_ei.jbgr_cd = sndr_jg.jbgr_cd left join member rcvr_m on pr.rcvr_user_id = rcvr_m.user_id left join employee_info rcvr_ei on pr.rcvr_user_id = rcvr_ei.user_id left join job_grade rcvr_jg on rcvr_ei.jbgr_cd = rcvr_jg.jbgr_cd
order by pm.ntce_snd_dt desc

select count(distinct pm.ntce_sn) from post_master pm left join post_receiver pr on pm.ntce_sn = pr.ntce_sn and pr.rcvr_user_id = ( case when exists (select 1 from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn and rcvr_user_id = #{userId}) then #{userId} else (select min(rcvr_user_id) from post_receiver where ntce_sn = pm.ntce_sn) end ) left join post_sender ps on pm.ntce_sn = ps.ntce_sn
